{"type":"mark","name":"lsp.did_open","count":1,"args":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file:///home/user/Project/aegis/aegis-server/supabase/functions/start-game/index.ts","languageId":"typescript","version":3,"text":"import { serve } from \"https://deno.land/std@0.168.0/http/server.ts\";\nimport { createClient } from \"https://esm.sh/@supabase/supabase-js@2\";\n\nconst corsHeaders = {\n  'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',\n  'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'authorization, x-client-info, apikey, content-type',\n};\n\nserve(async (req: Request) => {\n  if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {\n    return new Response('ok', { headers: corsHeaders });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const supabase = createClient(\n      Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_URL\") ?? \"\",\n      Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\") ?? \"\"\n    );\n\n    const authHeader = req.headers.get('Authorization');\n    if (!authHeader) throw new Error('Missing Authorization header');\n\n    const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser(authHeader.replace('Bearer ', ''));\n    if (authError || !user) throw new Error('Unauthorized');\n\n    const { betAmount, mineCount } = await req.json();\n\n    // 1. Dev Faucet & Balance Check\n    const { data: profile } = await supabase\n      .from('profiles')\n      .select('balance_usd')\n      .eq('id', user.id)\n      .single();\n\n    let currentBalance = profile?.balance_usd || 0;\n\n    if (currentBalance < betAmount) {\n      // Auto-fund empty developer accounts with $1,000 to test!\n      currentBalance = 1000; \n    }\n\n    const newBalance = currentBalance - betAmount;\n    await supabase.from('profiles').upsert({ id: user.id, balance_usd: newBalance });\n\n    // 2. Auto-Generate Provably Fair Seeds if missing\n    let { data: seedPair } = await supabase\n      .from('seed_pairs') // Matches SQL\n      .select('*')\n      .eq('user_id', user.id)\n      .eq('is_active', true)\n      .single();\n\n    if (!seedPair) {\n      const serverSeedRaw = crypto.randomUUID();\n      const hashBuffer = await crypto.subtle.digest(\"SHA-256\", new TextEncoder().encode(serverSeedRaw));\n      const serverSeedHash = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBuffer)).map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');\n      const clientSeed = \"client_\" + Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 10);\n\n      const { data: newSeed, error: seedError } = await supabase\n        .from('seed_pairs')\n        .insert({\n          user_id: user.id,\n          server_seed_raw: serverSeedRaw, // Matches SQL\n          server_seed_hash: serverSeedHash,\n          client_seed: clientSeed,\n          nonce: 0,\n          is_active: true\n        })\n        .select('*')\n        .single();\n\n      if (seedError) throw seedError;\n      seedPair = newSeed;\n    }\n\n    const newNonce = seedPair.nonce + 1;\n    await supabase.from('seed_pairs').update({ nonce: newNonce }).eq('id', seedPair.id);\n\n    // 3. Generate Mines via Fisher-Yates\n    const seedString = `${seedPair.server_seed_raw}:${seedPair.client_seed}:${newNonce}`;\n    const hashBufferMines = await crypto.subtle.digest(\"SHA-256\", new TextEncoder().encode(seedString));\n    const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(hashBufferMines));\n\n    const deck = Array.from({ length: 25 }, (_, i) => i);\n    let cursor = 0;\n    \n    for (let i = 24; i > 0; i--) {\n      const randomInt = (hashArray[cursor] << 8) | hashArray[cursor + 1];\n      cursor = (cursor + 2) % (hashArray.length - 1);\n      const j = randomInt % (i + 1);\n      [deck[i], deck[j]] = [deck[j], deck[i]];\n    }\n    \n    const minePositions = deck.slice(0, mineCount);\n\n    // 4. Create the Game Record\n    const { data: game, error: insertError } = await supabase\n      .from('mines_games')\n      .insert({\n        user_id: user.id,\n        seed_pair_id: seedPair.id, // Matches SQL\n        bet_amount: betAmount,\n        mine_count: mineCount,     // Matches SQL\n        mine_positions: minePositions, \n        status: 'active'\n      })\n      .select('id')\n      .single();\n\n    if (insertError) throw insertError;\n\n    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, gameId: game.id, newBalance }), {\n      headers: { ...corsHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    });\n    \n} catch (err: unknown) {\n    console.error(\"Game start error:\", err);\n    \n    // Extract the real error message even if it's a Supabase custom error object\n    let errorMessage = \"Unknown error\";\n    if (typeof err === 'object' && err !== null) {\n      if ('message' in err) {\n        errorMessage = String((err as Record<string, unknown>).message);\n      } else {\n        errorMessage = JSON.stringify(err);\n      }\n    } else if (typeof err === 'string') {\n      errorMessage = err;\n    }\n\n    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: errorMessage }), { \n      status: 400,\n      headers: { ...corsHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" }\n    });\n  }\n});\n"}}},

{"type":"mark","name":"lsp.did_open","count":3,"args":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file:///home/user/Project/aegis/aegis-server/supabase/functions/reveal-tile/index.ts","languageId":"typescript","version":1,"text":"import { serve } from \"https://deno.land/std@0.168.0/http/server.ts\";\nimport { createClient } from \"https://esm.sh/@supabase/supabase-js@2\";\n// UPDATED: Import the Total Payout function instead!\nimport { calculateTotalPayout } from '../_shared/betting-logic.ts';\n\nconst corsHeaders = {\n  'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',\n  'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'authorization, x-client-info, apikey, content-type',\n};\n\nserve(async (req: Request) => {\n  if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {\n    return new Response('ok', { headers: corsHeaders });\n  }\n\n  const supabase = createClient(\n    Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_URL\") ?? \"\",\n    Deno.env.get(\"SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY\") ?? \"\"\n  );\n\n  try {\n    const { gameId, tileId } = await req.json();\n    \n    // 1. Fetch Game State\n    const { data: game, error: fetchError } = await supabase\n      .from(\"mines_games\")\n      .select(\"*\")\n      .eq(\"id\", gameId)\n      .single();\n\n    if (fetchError || !game || game.status !== 'active') {\n      throw new Error(\"Game not found or already finished.\");\n    }\n\n    // 2. Prevent Double-Clicking\n    if (game.revealed_tiles.includes(tileId)) {\n      throw new Error(\"Tile already revealed.\");\n    }\n\n    const isMine = game.mine_positions.includes(tileId);\n    let updateData: Record<string, unknown> = {}; \n    let newMultiplier = game.payout_multiplier;\n\n    if (isMine) {\n      updateData = {\n        status: 'busted',\n        revealed_tiles: [...game.revealed_tiles, tileId],\n        final_payout: 0,\n      };\n    } else {\n      // FIX: Calculate the true accumulated multiplier using $1 as a base\n      newMultiplier = calculateTotalPayout(1, game.revealed_tiles.length + 1, {\n        totalTiles: 25,\n        mineCount: game.mine_count,\n        houseEdge: 0.02, // 🚨 UPDATED: 2% House Edge (98% RTP)\n      });\n\n      updateData = {\n        revealed_tiles: [...game.revealed_tiles, tileId],\n        payout_multiplier: newMultiplier,\n      };\n    }\n\n    // 3. Update Database\n    const { error: updateError } = await supabase\n      .from(\"mines_games\")\n      .update(updateData)\n      .eq(\"id\", gameId);\n\n    if (updateError) throw updateError;\n\n    // FIX: Restored minePositions to the return statement so the board reveals!\n    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ \n      isMine, \n      payout_multiplier: newMultiplier,\n      minePositions: game.mine_positions \n    }), {\n      headers: { ...corsHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" }\n    });\n\n  } catch (err: unknown) {\n    let errorMessage = \"Unknown error\";\n    if (err instanceof Error) errorMessage = err.message;\n    else if (typeof err === 'object' && err !== null && 'message' in err) {\n      errorMessage = String((err as Record<string, unknown>).message);\n    }\n    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: errorMessage }), { \n      status: 400,\n      headers: { ...corsHeaders, \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" }\n    });\n  }\n});\n"}}},

SEED SYSTEM (The Fairness Engine)\n-- We store the hash of the server seed. Maintain Auth State to prevent getSession() deadlocks\n  useEffect(() => {\n    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => setSession(session));\n    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => setSession(session));\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  // 2. Fetch Balance whenever session changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchBalance = async () => {\n      if (!session?.user) return; // Wait for session\n      \n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('profiles')\n          .select('balance_usd')\n          .eq('id', session.user.id)\n          .single();\n          \n        if (error) setBalance(0);\n        else if (data) setBalance(Number(data.balance_usd));\n      } catch {\n        setBalance(0);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchBalance();\n    window.addEventListener('balance-updated', fetchBalance);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('balance-updated', fetchBalance);\n  }, [session]);\n\n  const handleDeposit = async () => {\n    if (!session) {\n      setDepositError(\"No active session. Please sign in.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setIsDepositing(true);\n    setDepositError(null); \n    \n    try {\n      // 🚨 FIX: Force a 10-second timeout so the button can never get permanently stuck\n      const controller = new AbortController();\n      const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 10000);\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/deposit-funds`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ amount: depositAmount }),\n        signal: controller.signal\n      });\n\n      clearTimeout(timeoutId);\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n      if (!response.ok || result.error) throw new Error(result.error || \"Unknown edge function error.\");\n\n      window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated'));\n      setIsCashierOpen(false); \n      \n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Deposit failed:\", error);\n      if (error instanceof Error) {\n        // Catch the timeout and display a clear error\n        setDepositError(error.name === 'AbortError' ? Maintain Auth State to prevent getSession() deadlocks\n  useEffect(() => {\n    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => setSession(session));\n    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => setSession(session));\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  // 2. Fetch Balance whenever session changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchBalance = async () => {\n      if (!session?.user) return; // Wait for session\n      \n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('profiles')\n          .select('balance_usd')\n          .eq('id', session.user.id)\n          .single();\n          \n        if (error) setBalance(0);\n        else if (data) setBalance(Number(data.balance_usd));\n      } catch {\n        setBalance(0);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchBalance();\n    window.addEventListener('balance-updated', fetchBalance);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('balance-updated', fetchBalance);\n  }, [session]);\n\n  const handleDeposit = async () => {\n    if (!session) {\n      setDepositError(\"No active session. Please sign in.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setIsDepositing(true);\n    setDepositError(null); \n    \n    try {\n      // 🚨 FIX: Force a 10-second timeout so the button can never get permanently stuck\n      const controller = new AbortController();\n      const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 10000);\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/deposit-funds`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ amount: depositAmount }),\n        signal: controller.signal\n      });\n\n      clearTimeout(timeoutId);\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n      if (!response.ok || result.error) throw new Error(result.error || \"Unknown edge function error.\");\n\n      window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated'));\n      setIsCashierOpen(false); \n      \n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Deposit failed:\", error);\n      if (error instanceof Error) {\n        // Catch the timeout and display a clear error\n        setDepositError(error.name === 'AbortError' ? 'Request timed out. The backend server is frozen.' : error.message);\n      } else {\n        setDepositError(String(error));\n      }\n    } finally {\n      setIsDepositing(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <>\n      <header className=\"w-full flex justify-center relative max-w-7xl mx-auto pt-4 md:pt-6 px-4 md:px-8\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-4xl md:text-5xl font-black tracking-widest text-emerald-400 drop-shadow-md cursor-default\">\n            AEGIS\n          </h1>\n          <h2 className=\"mt-2 text-xs md:text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-400 uppercase text-center cursor-default\">\n            Provably Fair. <span className=\"text-emerald-500\">Instantly Settled.</span>\n          </h2>\n        </div>\n border-slate-800 p-3 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl md:bg-transparent md:border-none md:p-0 md:shadow-none md:absolute md:bottom-auto md:left-auto md:right-8 md:top-6 md:translate-x-0 md:w-auto\">  */}\n rounded-2xl shadow-2xl md:bg-transparent md:border-none md:p-0 md:shadow-none md:absolute md:bottom-auto md:left-auto md:right-8 md:top-6 md:translate-x-0 md:w-auto\">\n          {/* History Button {"type":"mark","name":"lsp.did_open","count":28,"args":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file:///home/user/Project/aegis/aegis-client/packages/game-mines/src/MinesBoard.tsx","languageId":"typescriptreact","version":1,"text":"'use client';\n\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { initMinesGame } from '@aegis/shared-config';\nimport { supabase } from '@aegis/shared-config'; \n\nexport default function MinesPage() {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col z-25 items-center py-12 px-4 bg-slate-950 text-white\">\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-5xl mb-8 flex justify-between items-center\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-black tracking-widest text-emerald-400\">\n          MINES\n        </h1>\n      </div>\n      <MinesBoard />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction MinesBoard() {\n\n  const gameContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);\n  const phaserInstanceRef = useRef<Phaser.Game | null>(null);\n  const activeGameIdRef = useRef<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Game State\n  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState<number>(10);\n  const [mineCount, setMineCount] = useState<number>(3);\n  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState<'idle' | 'playing' | 'cashed_out' | 'busted'>('idle');\n  const [activeGameId, setActiveGameId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [currentMultiplier, setCurrentMultiplier] = useState<number>(1.00);\n\n  // ADD THIS: State for the custom Provably Fair Modal\n  const [rotatedSeeds, setRotatedSeeds] = useState<{\n    oldServerSeedRaw: string;\n    newServerSeedHash: string;\n    newClientSeed: string;\n  } | null>(null);\n\n  // Initialize the Phaser Canvas\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && gameContainerRef.current && !phaserInstanceRef.current) {\n      \n      const handleTileClick = async (tileId: number): Promise<boolean> => {\n        if (!activeGameIdRef.current) {\n          console.warn(\"Click ignored: No active game ID.\");\n          return false; \n        }\n\n        try {\n          const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/reveal-tile`, {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({ gameId: activeGameIdRef.current, tileId }),\n          });\n\n          const result = await response.json();\n\n          if (!response.ok || result.error) {\n            console.error(\"Server refused to reveal tile:\", result.error);\n            alert(`Server Error: ${result.error}`); \n            throw new Error(result.error);\n          }\n\n          if (result.isMine) {\n            setGameState('busted');\n            activeGameIdRef.current = null;\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.sound.play('explosion', { volume: 0.6 });\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.events.emit('reveal-board', result.minePositions);\n            return true;\n          } else {\n            setCurrentMultiplier(result.payout_multiplier);\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.sound.play('reveal', { volume: 0.4 });\n            return false;\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"Tile reveal failed:\", error);\n          throw error; \n        }\n      };\n\n      phaserInstanceRef.current = initMinesGame({\n        containerId: 'mines-canvas-container',\n        onTileClick: handleTileClick,\n      });\n    }\n\n    return () => {\n      if (phaserInstanceRef.current) {\n        phaserInstanceRef.current.destroy(true);\n        phaserInstanceRef.current = null;\n      }\n    };\n  }, [activeGameId]);\n\n  const handleCashOut = async () => {\n    const audio = new Audio('https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2000/2000-preview.mp3');\n    audio.volume = 0.5;\n    audio.play();  \n    if (!activeGameIdRef.current) return;\n\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) throw new Error(\"No active session\");\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/cash-out`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ gameId: activeGameIdRef.current }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (!response.ok || result.error) {\n        throw new Error(result.error);\n      }\n\n    setGameState('cashed_out'); \n      activeGameIdRef.current = null;\n      // ADD THIS: Trigger Phaser to reveal the rest of the board!\n      phaserInstanceRef.current?.events.emit('reveal-board', result.minePositions);\n      // ADD THIS: Ping the Header to add the winnings!\n      window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated'));      \n      //alert(`🎉 CASHED OUT!\\nYou won $${result.finalPayout.toFixed(2)}\\nNew Balance: $${result.newBalance.toFixed(2)}`);\n      \n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Cash out failed:\", error);\n      alert(`Error cashing out: ${error}`);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleRotateSeed = async () => {\n    if (gameState === 'playing') {\n      alert(\"You can only rotate your seed when not in an active game!\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) throw new Error(\"No active session\");\n\n      const customClientSeed = window.prompt(\"Enter a custom Client Seed (or leave blank to auto-generate):\");\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/rotate-seed`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ customClientSeed: customClientSeed || undefined }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (!response.ok || result.error) throw new Error(result.error);\n\n      // Replace the old alert() block with this:\n      setRotatedSeeds({\n        oldServerSeedRaw: result.oldServerSeedRaw || \"None (First time playing)\",\n        newServerSeedHash: result.newServerSeedHash,\n        newClientSeed: result.newClientSeed\n      });\n      \n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Seed rotation failed:\", error);\n      alert(`Error rotating seed: ${error}`);\n    }\n  };\n  \n  const startGame = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) {\n        console.error(\"No active session found. Please sign in.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/start-game`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}` \n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ betAmount, mineCount }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        setGameState('playing');\n        setCurrentMultiplier(1.00);\n        setActiveGameId(result.gameId);\n        activeGameIdRef.current = result.gameId; \n        // ADD THIS: Ping the Header to subtract the bet amount!\n        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated')); \n        console.log(`Real game started! Postgres ID: ${result.gameId}`);\n        console.log(`New Wallet Balance: $${result.newBalance}`);\n      } else {\n        console.error(\"Backend error:\", result.error);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Network error starting game:\", error);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 z-25 items-start w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6 bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl\">\n      \n      {/* LEFT PANEL: Betting Controls */}\n      <div className=\"w-full md:w-80 flex flex-col gap-6 bg-slate-950 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-800\">\n        \n        {/* Bet Amount Input */}\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          <label htmlFor=\"betAmount\" className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm font-semibold\">Bet Amount (USD)</label>\n          <div className=\"flex bg-slate-900 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-slate-700\">\n            <span className=\"p-3 text-emerald-500 font-bold\">$</span>\n            <input \n              id=\"betAmount\"\n              type=\"number\" \n              value={betAmount}\n              onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(Number(e.target.value))}\n              disabled={gameState === 'playing'}\n              className=\"w-full bg-transparent text-white font-bold outline-none\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Mines Count Selector */}\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          <label className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm font-semibold\">Mines</label>\n          <select \n            value={mineCount}\n            onChange={(e) => setMineCount(Number(e.target.value))}\n            disabled={gameState === 'playing'}\n            className=\"w-full p-3 bg-slate-900 text-white font-bold rounded-lg border border-slate-700 outline-none\"\n          >\n            {[...Array(24)].map((_, i) => (\n              <option key={i + 1} value={i + 1}>{i + 1}</option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Controls */}\n        <div className=\"mt-6 flex flex-col items-center w-full\">\n          {gameState === 'playing' ? (\n            <button \n              onClick={handleCashOut}\n              className=\"w-full max-w-[500px] py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-500 hover:from-amber-400 hover:to-orange-400 text-white font-black text-xl tracking-widest rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.4)] transition-all active:scale-95\"\n            >\n              CASH OUT ({currentMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x)\n            </button>\n          ) : (\n            <button \n              onClick={startGame}\n              className=\"w-full max-w-[500px] py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-emerald-600 hover:from-emerald-400 hover:to-emerald-500 text-white font-black text-xl tracking-widest rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20 transition-all active:scale-95\"\n            >\n              {gameState === 'busted' ? 'PLAY AGAIN' : 'BET $10.00'}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Provably Fair Button */}\n          {gameState !== 'playing' && (\n            <button \n              onClick={handleRotateSeed}\n              className=\"mt-4 text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 hover:text-emerald-400 tracking-wider uppercase transition-colors\"\n            >\n              Provably Fair Settings\n            </button>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* RIGHT PANEL: Phaser Game Canvas */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full max-w-[500px]\">\n        \n        {/* Multiplier Display - Moved safely OUTSIDE the canvas wrapper! */}\n        <div className=\"h-16 flex items-center justify-center mb-4 w-full\">\n          {gameState === 'playing' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-tighter drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)]\">\n              {currentMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x\n            </h3>\n          )}\n          {gameState === 'busted' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-red-500 tracking-tighter\">BUSTED</h3>\n          )}\n          {gameState === 'cashed_out' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-tighter\">WINNER!</h3>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Wrapper to safely isolate React and Phaser DOMs */}\n        <div className=\"relative w-full aspect-square rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-800 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden bg-slate-950\">\n          \n          {/* 1. The Phaser Container */}\n          <div id=\"mines-canvas-container\" ref={gameContainerRef} className=\"w-full h-full\" />\n\n          {/* 2. The React Overlay - Now a bulletproof click shield! */}\n          {gameState === 'idle' && (\n            <div \n              className=\"absolute inset-0 z-10 bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center cursor-not-allowed\"\n              onPointerDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}\n              onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}\n            >\n              <span className=\"text-xl font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-widest\">PLACE BET TO START</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n        </div>\n\n      </div>\n\n      {/* ADD THIS: The Custom Seed Modal Overlay */}\n      {rotatedSeeds && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4\">\n          <div className=\"bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-2xl p-6 w-full max-w-lg shadow-2xl space-y-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-wider\">✅ SEED ROTATED</h3>\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">Copy your previous server seed below to verify your past games.</p>\n            \n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n value={rotatedSeeds.oldServerSeedRaw} \n                className=\"w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm h-20 outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 text-slate-500 uppercase\">New Server Hash</label>\n              <input \n                readOnly \n                value={rotatedSeeds.newServerSeedHash} \n                className=\"w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 transition-colors selection:bg-emerald-500/30\" \n              />\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n              <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase\">New Client Seed</label>\n              <input \n                readOnly \n                value={rotatedSeeds.newClientSeed} \n                className=\"w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm outline-none Maintain Auth State to prevent getSession() deadlocks\n  useEffect(() => {\n    supabase.auth.getSession().then(({ data: { session } }) => setSession(session));\n    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => setSession(session));\n    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();\n  }, []);\n\n  // 2. Fetch Balance whenever session changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const fetchBalance = async () => {\n      if (!session?.user) return; // Wait for session\n      \n      try {\n        const { data, error } = await supabase\n          .from('profiles')\n          .select('balance_usd')\n          .eq('id', session.user.id)\n          .single();\n          \n        if (error) setBalance(0);\n        else if (data) setBalance(Number(data.balance_usd));\n      } catch {\n        setBalance(0);\n      }\n    };\n\n    fetchBalance();\n    window.addEventListener('balance-updated', fetchBalance);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('balance-updated', fetchBalance);\n  }, [session]);\n\n  const handleDeposit = async () => {\n    if (!session) {\n      setDepositError(\"No active session. * as Phaser from 'phaser';\n\nexport type TileClickHandler = (tileId: number) => Promise<boolean | void>;\n\nexport interface MinesGameConfig {\n  containerId: string;\n  onTileClick: TileClickHandler;\n}\n\nexport class MinesScene extends Phaser.Scene {\n  private onTileClick: TileClickHandler;\n\n  constructor(onTileClick: TileClickHandler) {\n    super('MinesScene');\n    this.onTileClick = onTileClick;\n  }\n\n  preload(): void {\n\n    this.load.audio('reveal', 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2003/2003-preview.mp3');\n    this.load.audio('explosion', 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/1696/1696-preview.mp3');\n    this.load.audio('cashout', 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2000/2000-preview.mp3');\n    \n    this.load.image('tile', '/assets/tile.png');\n    this.load.image('gem', '/assets/gem.png');\n    this.load.image('bomb', '/assets/bomb.png');\n  }\n\n  create(): void {\n    const GRID_SIZE = 5;\n    const TILE_SPACING = 100;\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE * GRID_SIZE; i++) {\n      const x = (i % GRID_SIZE) * TILE_SPACING + 50;\n      const y = Math.floor(i / GRID_SIZE) * TILE_SPACING + 50;\n      \n      const tile = this.add.sprite(x, y, 'tile').setInteractive();\n      tile.setData('id', i);\n\n      tile.on('pointerdown', async () => {\n        tile.disableInteractive();\n        const isHit = await this.onTileClick(i);\n        if (isHit) {\n          tile.setTexture('bomb');\n          // Add a little shake effect when hitting a bomb!\n          this.cameras.main.shake(200, 0.02);\n        } else {\n          tile.setTexture('gem');\n        }\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Listen for the custom \"reveal-board\" event from React\n    this.game.events.on('reveal-board', (minePositions: number[]) => {\n      this.children.list.forEach((child) => {\n        const sprite = child as Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite;\n        // Only flip tiles that haven't been clicked yet\n        if (sprite.texture.key === 'tile') {\n          const id = sprite.getData('id');\n          if (minePositions.includes(id)) {\n            // Unclicked mines appear slightly dimmed\n            sprite.setTexture('bomb').setAlpha(0.6).setTint(0xffaaaa);\n          } else {\n            // Unclicked gems appear slightly dimmed\n            sprite.setTexture('gem').setAlpha(0.6).setTint(0xaaffaa);\n          }\n        }\n        // Disable all clicks once the board is revealed\n        sprite.disableInteractive();\n      });\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nexport const initMinesGame = (config: MinesGameConfig): Phaser.Game => {\n  const PhaserConfig: Phaser.Types.Core.GameConfig = {\n    type: Phaser.AUTO,\n    parent: config.containerId,\n    // Add mobile responsiveness scaling!\n    scale: {\n      mode: Phaser.Scale.FIT,\n      autoCenter: Phaser.Scale.CENTER_BOTH,\n      width: 500,\n      height: 500,\n    },\n    backgroundColor: '#020617',\n    scene: new MinesScene(config.onTileClick),\n  };\n\n  return new Phaser.Game(PhaserConfig);\n};\n"}}},

\n\nexport default function MinesPage() {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col z-25 items-center py-12 px-4 bg-slate-950 text-white\">\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-5xl mb-8 flex justify-between items-center\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-black tracking-widest text-emerald-400\">\n          MINES\n        </h1>\n      </div>\n      <MinesBoard />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction MinesBoard() {\n\n  const gameContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);\n  const phaserInstanceRef = useRef<Phaser.Game | null>(null);\n  const activeGameIdRef = useRef<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Game State\n  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState<number>(10);\n  const [mineCount, setMineCount] = useState<number>(3);\n  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState<'idle' | 'playing' | 'cashed_out' | 'busted'>('idle');\n  const [activeGameId, setActiveGameId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [currentMultiplier, setCurrentMultiplier] = useState<number>(1.00);\n\n  // ADD THIS: State for the custom Provably Fair Modal\n  const [rotatedSeeds, setRotatedSeeds] = useState<{\n    oldServerSeedRaw: string;\n    newServerSeedHash: string;\n    newClientSeed: string;\n  } | null>(null);\n\n  // Initialize the Phaser Canvas\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && gameContainerRef.current && !phaserInstanceRef.current) {\n      \n      const handleTileClick = async (tileId: number): Promise<boolean> => {\n        if (!activeGameIdRef.current) {\n          console.warn(\"Click ignored: No active game ID.\");\n          return false; \n        }\n\n        try {\n          const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/reveal-tile`, {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({ gameId: activeGameIdRef.current, tileId }),\n          });\n\n          const result = await response.json();\n\n          if (!response.ok || result.error) {\n            console.error(\"Server refused to reveal tile:\", result.error);\n            alert(`Server Error: ${result.error}`); \n            throw new Error(result.error);\n          }\n\n          if (result.isMine) {\n            setGameState('busted');\n            activeGameIdRef.current = null;\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.sound.play('explosion', { volume: 0.6 });\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.events.emit('reveal-board', result.minePositions);\n            return true;\n          } else {\n            setCurrentMultiplier(result.payout_multiplier);\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.sound.play('reveal', { volume: 0.4 });\n            return false;\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"Tile reveal failed:\", error);\n          throw error; \n        }\n      };\n\n      phaserInstanceRef.current = initMinesGame({\n        containerId: 'mines-canvas-container',\n        onTileClick: handleTileClick,\n      });\n    }\n\n    return () => {\n      if (phaserInstanceRef.current) {\n        phaserInstanceRef.current.destroy(true);\n        phaserInstanceRef.current = null;\n      }\n    };\n  }, [activeGameId]);\n\n  const handleCashOut = async () => {\n    const audio = new Audio('https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2000/2000-preview.mp3');\n    audio.volume = 0.5;\n    audio.play();  \n    if (!activeGameIdRef.current) return;\n\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) throw new Error(\"No active session\");\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/cash-out`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ gameId: activeGameIdRef.current }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (!response.ok || result.error) {\n        throw new Error(result.error);\n      }\n\n    setGameState('cashed_out'); \n      activeGameIdRef.current = null;\n      // ADD THIS: Trigger Phaser to reveal the rest of the board!\n      phaserInstanceRef.current?.events.emit('reveal-board', result.minePositions);\n      // ADD THIS: Ping the Header to add the winnings!\n      window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated'));      \n      //alert(`🎉 CASHED OUT!\\nYou won $${result.finalPayout.toFixed(2)}\\nNew Balance: $${result.newBalance.toFixed(2)}`);\n      \n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Cash out failed:\", error);\n      alert(`Error cashing out: ${error}`);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleRotateSeed = async () => {\n    if (gameState === 'playing') {\n      alert(\"You can only rotate your seed when not in an active game!\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) throw new Error(\"No active session\");\n\n      const customClientSeed = window.prompt(\"Enter a custom Client Seed (or leave blank to auto-generate):\");\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/rotate-seed`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ customClientSeed: customClientSeed || undefined }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (!response.ok || result.error) throw new Error(result.error);\n\n      // Replace the old alert() block with this:\n      setRotatedSeeds({\n        oldServerSeedRaw: result.oldServerSeedRaw || \"None (First time playing)\",\n        newServerSeedHash: result.newServerSeedHash,\n        newClientSeed: result.newClientSeed\n      });\n      \n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Seed rotation failed:\", error);\n      alert(`Error rotating seed: ${error}`);\n    }\n  };\n  \n  const startGame = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) {\n        console.error(\"No active session found. Please sign in.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/start-game`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}` \n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ betAmount, mineCount }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        setGameState('playing');\n        setCurrentMultiplier(1.00);\n        setActiveGameId(result.gameId);\n        activeGameIdRef.current = result.gameId; \n        // ADD THIS: Ping the Header to subtract the bet amount!\n        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated')); \n        console.log(`Real game started! Postgres ID: ${result.gameId}`);\n        console.log(`New Wallet Balance: $${result.newBalance}`);\n      } else {\n        console.error(\"Backend error:\", result.error);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Network error starting game:\", error);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 z-25 items-start w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6 bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl\">\n      \n      {/* LEFT PANEL: Betting Controls */}\n      <div className=\"w-full md:w-80 flex flex-col gap-6 bg-slate-950 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-800\">\n        \n        {/* Bet Amount Input */}\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          <label htmlFor=\"betAmount\" className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm font-semibold\">Bet Amount (USD)</label>\n          <div className=\"flex bg-slate-900 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-slate-700\">\n            <span className=\"p-3 text-emerald-500 font-bold\">$</span>\n            <input \n              id=\"betAmount\"\n              type=\"number\" \n              value={betAmount}\n              onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(Number(e.target.value))}\n              disabled={gameState === 'playing'}\n              className=\"w-full bg-transparent text-white font-bold outline-none\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Mines Count Selector */}\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          <label className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm font-semibold\">Mines</label>\n          <select \n            value={mineCount}\n            onChange={(e) => setMineCount(Number(e.target.value))}\n            disabled={gameState === 'playing'}\n            className=\"w-full p-3 bg-slate-900 text-white font-bold rounded-lg border border-slate-700 outline-none\"\n          >\n            {[...Array(24)].map((_, i) => (\n              <option key={i + 1} value={i + 1}>{i + 1}</option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Controls */}\n        <div className=\"mt-6 flex flex-col items-center w-full\">\n          {gameState === 'playing' ? (\n            <button \n              onClick={handleCashOut}\n              className=\"w-full max-w-[500px] py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-500 hover:from-amber-400 hover:to-orange-400 text-white font-black text-xl tracking-widest rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.4)] transition-all active:scale-95\"\n            >\n              CASH OUT ({currentMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x)\n            </button>\n          ) : (\n            <button \n              onClick={startGame}\n              className=\"w-full max-w-[500px] py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-emerald-600 hover:from-emerald-400 hover:to-emerald-500 text-white font-black text-xl tracking-widest rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20 transition-all active:scale-95\"\n            >\n              {gameState === 'busted' ? 'PLAY AGAIN' : 'BET $10.00'}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Provably Fair Button */}\n          {gameState !== 'playing' && (\n            <button \n              onClick={handleRotateSeed}\n              className=\"mt-4 text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 hover:text-emerald-400 tracking-wider uppercase transition-colors\"\n            >\n              Provably Fair Settings\n            </button>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* RIGHT PANEL: Phaser Game Canvas */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full max-w-[500px]\">\n        \n        {/* Multiplier Display - Moved safely OUTSIDE the canvas wrapper! */}\n        <div className=\"h-16 flex items-center justify-center mb-4 w-full\">\n          {gameState === 'playing' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-tighter drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)]\">\n              {currentMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x\n            </h3>\n          )}\n          {gameState === 'busted' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-red-500 tracking-tighter\">BUSTED</h3>\n          )}\n          {gameState === 'cashed_out' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-tighter\">WINNER!</h3>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Wrapper to safely isolate React and Phaser DOMs */}\n        <div className=\"relative w-full aspect-square rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-800 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden bg-slate-950\">\n          \n          {/* 1. The Phaser Container */}\n          <div id=\"mines-canvas-container\" ref={gameContainerRef} className=\"w-full h-full\" />\n\n          {/* 2. The React Overlay - Now a bulletproof click shield! */}\n          {gameState === 'idle' && (\n            <div \n              className=\"absolute inset-0 z-10 bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center cursor-not-allowed\"\n              onPointerDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}\n              onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}\n            >\n              <span className=\"text-xl font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-widest\">PLACE BET TO START</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n        </div>\n\n      </div>\n\n      {/* ADD THIS: The Custom Seed Modal Overlay */}\n      {rotatedSeeds && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4\">\n          <div className=\"bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-2xl p-6 w-full max-w-lg shadow-2xl space-y-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-wider\">✅ SEED value={rotatedSeeds.oldServerSeedRaw} \n                className=\"w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm h-20 outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 </div>\n\n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n              <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase\">New Client Seed</label>\n              <input \n                readOnly \n                value={rotatedSeeds.newClientSeed} \n                className=\"w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm outline-none {"type":"mark","name":"lsp.did_open","count":32,"args":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file:///home/user/Project/aegis/aegis-client/packages/game-mines/src/minesConfig.ts","languageId":"typescript","version":1,"text":"import * as Phaser from 'phaser';\n\nexport type TileClickHandler = (tileId: number) => Promise<boolean | void>;\n\nexport interface MinesGameConfig {\n  containerId: string;\n  onTileClick: TileClickHandler;\n}\n\nexport class MinesScene extends Phaser.Scene {\n  private onTileClick: TileClickHandler;\n\n  constructor(onTileClick: TileClickHandler) {\n    super('MinesScene');\n    this.onTileClick = onTileClick;\n  }\n\n  preload(): void {\n\n    this.load.audio('reveal', 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2003/2003-preview.mp3');\n    this.load.audio('explosion', 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/1696/1696-preview.mp3');\n    this.load.audio('cashout', 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2000/2000-preview.mp3');\n    \n    this.load.image('tile', '/assets/tile.png');\n    this.load.image('gem', '/assets/gem.png');\n    this.load.image('bomb', '/assets/bomb.png');\n  }\n\n  create(): void {\n    const GRID_SIZE = 5;\n    const TILE_SPACING = 100;\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE * GRID_SIZE; i++) {\n      const x = (i % GRID_SIZE) * TILE_SPACING + 50;\n      const y = Math.floor(i / GRID_SIZE) * TILE_SPACING + 50;\n      \n      const tile = this.add.sprite(x, y, 'tile').setInteractive();\n      tile.setData('id', i);\n\n      tile.on('pointerdown', async () => {\n        tile.disableInteractive();\n        const isHit = await this.onTileClick(i);\n        if (isHit) {\n          tile.setTexture('bomb');\n          // Add a little shake effect when hitting a bomb!\n          this.cameras.main.shake(200, 0.02);\n        } else {\n          tile.setTexture('gem');\n        }\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Listen for the custom \"reveal-board\" event from React\n    this.game.events.on('reveal-board', (minePositions: number[]) => {\n      this.children.list.forEach((child) => {\n        const sprite = child as Phaser.GameObjects.Sprite;\n        // Only flip tiles that haven't been clicked yet\n        if (sprite.texture.key === 'tile') {\n          const id = sprite.getData('id');\n          if (minePositions.includes(id)) {\n            // Unclicked mines appear slightly dimmed\n            sprite.setTexture('bomb').setAlpha(0.6).setTint(0xffaaaa);\n          } else {\n            // Unclicked gems appear slightly dimmed\n            sprite.setTexture('gem').setAlpha(0.6).setTint(0xaaffaa);\n          }\n        }\n        // Disable all clicks once the board is revealed\n        sprite.disableInteractive();\n      });\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nexport const initMinesGame = (config: MinesGameConfig): Phaser.Game => {\n  const PhaserConfig: Phaser.Types.Core.GameConfig = {\n    type: Phaser.AUTO,\n    parent: config.containerId,\n    // Add mobile responsiveness scaling!\n    scale: {\n      mode: Phaser.Scale.FIT,\n      autoCenter: Phaser.Scale.CENTER_BOTH,\n      width: 500,\n      height: 500,\n    },\n    backgroundColor: '#020617',\n    scene: new MinesScene(config.onTileClick),\n  };\n\n  return new Phaser.Game(PhaserConfig);\n};\n"}}},

{"type":"mark","name":"lsp.did_open","count":33,"args":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file:///home/user/Project/aegis/aegis-client/packages/game-mines/src/MinesBoard.tsx","languageId":"typescriptreact","version":1,"text":"'use client';\n\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { initMinesGame } from '@aegis/shared-config';\nimport { supabase } from '@aegis/shared-config'; \n\nexport default function MinesPage() {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex flex-col z-25 items-center py-12 px-4 bg-slate-950 text-white\">\n      <div className=\"w-full max-w-5xl mb-8 flex justify-between items-center\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl font-black tracking-widest text-emerald-400\">\n          MINES\n        </h1>\n      </div>\n      <MinesBoard />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction MinesBoard() {\n\n  const gameContainerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);\n  const phaserInstanceRef = useRef<Phaser.Game | null>(null);\n  const activeGameIdRef = useRef<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Game State\n  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState<number>(10);\n  const [mineCount, setMineCount] = useState<number>(3);\n  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState<'idle' | 'playing' | 'cashed_out' | 'busted'>('idle');\n  const [activeGameId, setActiveGameId] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [currentMultiplier, setCurrentMultiplier] = useState<number>(1.00);\n\n  // ADD THIS: State for the custom Provably Fair Modal\n  const [rotatedSeeds, setRotatedSeeds] = useState<{\n    oldServerSeedRaw: string;\n    newServerSeedHash: string;\n    newClientSeed: string;\n  } | null>(null);\n\n  // Initialize the Phaser Canvas\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined' && gameContainerRef.current && !phaserInstanceRef.current) {\n      \n      const handleTileClick = async (tileId: number): Promise<boolean> => {\n        if (!activeGameIdRef.current) {\n          console.warn(\"Click ignored: No active game ID.\");\n          return false; \n        }\n\n        try {\n          const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/reveal-tile`, {\n            method: 'POST',\n            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n            body: JSON.stringify({ gameId: activeGameIdRef.current, tileId }),\n          });\n\n          const result = await response.json();\n\n          if (!response.ok || result.error) {\n            console.error(\"Server refused to reveal tile:\", result.error);\n            alert(`Server Error: ${result.error}`); \n            throw new Error(result.error);\n          }\n\n          if (result.isMine) {\n            setGameState('busted');\n            activeGameIdRef.current = null;\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.sound.play('explosion', { volume: 0.6 });\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.events.emit('reveal-board', result.minePositions);\n            return true;\n          } else {\n            setCurrentMultiplier(result.payout_multiplier);\n            phaserInstanceRef.current?.sound.play('reveal', { volume: 0.4 });\n            return false;\n          }\n        } catch (error) {\n          console.error(\"Tile reveal failed:\", error);\n          throw error; \n        }\n      };\n\n      phaserInstanceRef.current = initMinesGame({\n        containerId: 'mines-canvas-container',\n        onTileClick: handleTileClick,\n      });\n    }\n\n    return () => {\n      if (phaserInstanceRef.current) {\n        phaserInstanceRef.current.destroy(true);\n        phaserInstanceRef.current = null;\n      }\n    };\n  }, [activeGameId]);\n\n  const handleCashOut = async () => {\n    const audio = new Audio('https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2000/2000-preview.mp3');\n    audio.volume = 0.5;\n    audio.play();  \n    if (!activeGameIdRef.current) return;\n\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) throw new Error(\"No active session\");\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/cash-out`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ gameId: activeGameIdRef.current }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (!response.ok || result.error) {\n        throw new Error(result.error);\n      }\n\n    setGameState('cashed_out'); \n      activeGameIdRef.current = null;\n      // ADD THIS: Trigger Phaser to reveal the rest of the board!\n      phaserInstanceRef.current?.events.emit('reveal-board', result.minePositions);\n      // ADD THIS: Ping the Header to add the winnings!\n      window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated'));      \n      //alert(`🎉 CASHED OUT!\\nYou won $${result.finalPayout.toFixed(2)}\\nNew Balance: $${result.newBalance.toFixed(2)}`);\n      \n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Cash out failed:\", error);\n      alert(`Error cashing out: ${error}`);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleRotateSeed = async () => {\n    if (gameState === 'playing') {\n      alert(\"You can only rotate your seed when not in an active game!\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) throw new Error(\"No active session\");\n\n      const customClientSeed = window.prompt(\"Enter a custom Client Seed (or leave blank to auto-generate):\");\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/rotate-seed`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`\n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ customClientSeed: customClientSeed || undefined }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (!response.ok || result.error) throw new Error(result.error);\n\n      // Replace the old alert() block with this:\n      setRotatedSeeds({\n        oldServerSeedRaw: result.oldServerSeedRaw || \"None (First time playing)\",\n        newServerSeedHash: result.newServerSeedHash,\n        newClientSeed: result.newClientSeed\n      });\n      \n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Seed rotation failed:\", error);\n      alert(`Error rotating seed: ${error}`);\n    }\n  };\n  \n  const startGame = async () => {\n    try {\n      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) {\n        console.error(\"No active session found. Please sign in.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/start-game`, {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { \n          'Content-Type': 'application/json',\n          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}` \n        },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ betAmount, mineCount }),\n      });\n\n      const result = await response.json();\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        setGameState('playing');\n        setCurrentMultiplier(1.00);\n        setActiveGameId(result.gameId);\n        activeGameIdRef.current = result.gameId; \n        // ADD THIS: Ping the Header to subtract the bet amount!\n        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated')); \n        console.log(`Real game started! Postgres ID: ${result.gameId}`);\n        console.log(`New Wallet Balance: $${result.newBalance}`);\n      } else {\n        console.error(\"Backend error:\", result.error);\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      console.error(\"Network error starting game:\", error);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 z-25 items-start w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto p-6 bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl\">\n      \n      {/* LEFT PANEL: Betting Controls */}\n      <div className=\"w-full md:w-80 flex flex-col gap-6 bg-slate-950 p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-800\">\n        \n        {/* Bet Amount Input */}\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          <label htmlFor=\"betAmount\" className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm font-semibold\">Bet Amount (USD)</label>\n          <div className=\"flex bg-slate-900 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-slate-700\">\n            <span className=\"p-3 text-emerald-500 font-bold\">$</span>\n            <input \n              id=\"betAmount\"\n              type=\"number\" \n              value={betAmount}\n              onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(Number(e.target.value))}\n              disabled={gameState === 'playing'}\n              className=\"w-full bg-transparent text-white font-bold outline-none\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Mines Count Selector */}\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          <label className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm font-semibold\">Mines</label>\n          <select \n            value={mineCount}\n            onChange={(e) => setMineCount(Number(e.target.value))}\n            disabled={gameState === 'playing'}\n            className=\"w-full p-3 bg-slate-900 text-white font-bold rounded-lg border border-slate-700 outline-none\"\n          >\n            {[...Array(24)].map((_, i) => (\n              <option key={i + 1} value={i + 1}>{i + 1}</option>\n            ))}\n          </select>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Controls */}\n        <div className=\"mt-6 flex flex-col items-center w-full\">\n          {gameState === 'playing' ? (\n            <button \n              onClick={handleCashOut}\n              className=\"w-full max-w-[500px] py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-500 hover:from-amber-400 hover:to-orange-400 text-white font-black text-xl tracking-widest rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.4)] transition-all active:scale-95\"\n            >\n              CASH OUT ({currentMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x)\n            </button>\n          ) : (\n            <button \n              onClick={startGame}\n              className=\"w-full max-w-[500px] py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-emerald-600 hover:from-emerald-400 hover:to-emerald-500 text-white font-black text-xl tracking-widest rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20 transition-all active:scale-95\"\n            >\n              {gameState === 'busted' ? 'PLAY AGAIN' : 'BET $10.00'}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {/* Provably Fair Button */}\n          {gameState !== 'playing' && (\n            <button \n              onClick={handleRotateSeed}\n              className=\"mt-4 text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 hover:text-emerald-400 tracking-wider uppercase transition-colors\"\n            >\n              Provably Fair Settings\n            </button>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* RIGHT PANEL: Phaser Game Canvas */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full max-w-[500px]\">\n        \n        {/* Multiplier Display - Moved safely OUTSIDE the canvas wrapper! */}\n        <div className=\"h-16 flex items-center justify-center mb-4 w-full\">\n          {gameState === 'playing' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-tighter drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)]\">\n              {currentMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x\n            </h3>\n          )}\n          {gameState === 'busted' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-red-500 tracking-tighter\">BUSTED</h3>\n          )}\n          {gameState === 'cashed_out' && (\n            <h3 className=\"text-5xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-tighter\">WINNER!</h3>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Wrapper to safely isolate React and Phaser DOMs */}\n        <div className=\"relative w-full aspect-square rounded-xl border-2 border-slate-800 shadow-2xl overflow-hidden bg-slate-950\">\n          \n          {/* 1. The Phaser Container */}\n          <div id=\"mines-canvas-container\" ref={gameContainerRef} className=\"w-full h-full\" />\n\n          {/* 2. The React Overlay - Now a bulletproof click shield! */}\n          {gameState === 'idle' && (\n            <div \n              className=\"absolute inset-0 z-10 bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center cursor-not-allowed\"\n              onPointerDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}\n              onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}\n            >\n              <span className=\"text-xl font-bold text-slate-400 tracking-widest\">PLACE BET TO START</span>\n            </div>\n          )}\n\n        </div>\n\n      </div>\n\n      {/* ADD THIS: The Custom Seed Modal Overlay */}\n      {rotatedSeeds && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4\">\n          <div className=\"bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-2xl p-6 w-full max-w-lg shadow-2xl space-y-4\">\n            <h3 className=\"text-2xl font-black text-emerald-400 tracking-wider\">✅ SEED ROTATED</h3>\n            <p className=\"text-sm text-slate-400\">Copy your previous server seed below to verify your past games.</p>\n            \n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n value={rotatedSeeds.oldServerSeedRaw} \n                className=\"w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm h-20 outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 transition-colors selection:bg-emerald-500/30\" \n              />\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n              <label className=\"text-xs font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase\">New Client Seed</label>\n              <input \n                readOnly \n                value={rotatedSeeds.newClientSeed} \n                className=\"w-full bg-slate-950 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-white font-mono text-sm outline-none {"type":"mark","name":"lsp.did_open","count":35,"args":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file:///home/user/Project/aegis/aegis-client/packages/game-crash/src/CrashBoard.tsx","languageId":"typescriptreact","version":1,"text":"'use client';\n\nimport React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { io, Socket } from 'socket.io-client';\nimport { supabase } from '@aegis/shared-config';\n\ntype ChatMessage = {\n  id: string;\n  username: string;\n  message: string;\n  time: string;\n};\n\nexport default function CrashBoard() {\n  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState<'starting' | 'in-progress' | 'crashed'>('starting');\n  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState<number>(1.00);\n  const [timeRemaining, setTimeRemaining] = useState<number>(10);\n  const [history, setHistory] = useState<number[]>([]); \n  \n  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState<number>(10);\n  const [targetMultiplier, setTargetMultiplier] = useState<number>(2.00);\n  const [betStatus, setBetStatus] = useState<'idle' | 'placed' | 'won'>('idle');\n  const [, setRoundId] = useState<number>(0);\n  \n  // 🚨 NEW: Chat State\n  const [chatMessages, setChatMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([]);\n  const [chatInput, setChatInput] = useState('');\n  const chatEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  \n  const socketRef = useRef<Socket | null>(null);\n\n  // 🎵 Sound Effects Engine\n  const playSound = (type: 'click' | 'win' | 'crash') => {\n    const sounds = {\n      click: 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2568/2568-preview.mp3',\n      win: 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/2000/2000-preview.mp3',\n      crash: 'https://assets.mixkit.co/active_storage/sfx/1696/1696-preview.mp3'\n    };\n    const audio = new Audio(sounds[type]);\n    audio.volume = 0.5;\n    audio.play().catch(err => console.warn(\"Audio autoplay blocked by browser:\", err));\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // 🚨 CHANGED: Now using HTTPS to connect to the secure local server\n    //const socket = io('https://localhost:3001'); \n    // DEV - switched to http for developement\n    const socket = io(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL || 'http://localhost:3001');\n    socketRef.current = socket;\n\n    socket.on('connect', () => console.log('✅ Connected to live Crash Engine!'));\n\n    socket.on('game-tick', (state: { status: 'starting' | 'in-progress' | 'crashed'; multiplier: number; timeRemaining: number; history?: number[]; roundId: number }) => {\n      setGameState(state.status);\n      setMultiplier(state.multiplier);\n      setTimeRemaining(state.timeRemaining);\n      \n      if (state.history) setHistory(state.history);\n      \n      setRoundId((prevRoundId) => {\n        if (prevRoundId !== 0 && prevRoundId !== state.roundId) {\n          setBetStatus('idle'); \n        }\n        return state.roundId;\n      });\n    });\n\n    // 🚨 NEW: Chat Listeners\n    socket.on('chat-history', (msgs: ChatMessage[]) => {\n      setChatMessages(msgs);\n    });\n\n    socket.on('new-message', (msg: ChatMessage) => {\n      setChatMessages(prev => [...prev, msg]);\n    });\n\n    socket.on('bet-accepted', () => {\n      setBetStatus('placed');\n      window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated')); \n    });\n\n    socket.on('bet-error', (errorMsg: string) => {\n      alert(errorMsg);\n    });\n\n    socket.on('bet-won', () => {\n      setBetStatus('won');\n      playSound('win'); // 🚨 NEW: Play cashout sound!\n      window.dispatchEvent(new Event('balance-updated')); \n    });\n\n    return () => {\n      socket.disconnect();\n    };\n  }, []);\n\n  // 🚨 NEW: Auto-scroll chat to bottom\n  useEffect(() => {\n    chatEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  }, [chatMessages]);\n\n  const handlePlaceBet = async () => {\n    playSound('click'); // 🚨 NEW: Play click sound instantly\n    \n    const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n      if (!session) {\n        alert(\"Please connect your wallet and sign in first.\");\n        return;\n      }\n\n    if (socketRef.current) {\n      socketRef.current.emit('place-bet', {\n        token: session.access_token,\n        betAmount,\n        targetMultiplier\n      });\n    }\n  };\n\n  // 🚨 NEW: Watch for crashes to play the explosion!\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (gameState === 'crashed') {\n      playSound('crash');\n    }\n  }, [gameState]);\n\n  // 🚨 NEW: Send Message Handler\n  const handleSendMessage = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!chatInput.trim()) return;\n\n    const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();\n    if (!session) {\n      alert(\"Please connect your wallet and sign in to chat.\");\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (socketRef.current) {\n      socketRef.current.emit('send-message', {\n        token: session.access_token,\n        message: chatInput\n      });\n      setChatInput(''); // clear input\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    // WIDENED to max-w-7xl to fit 3 columns!\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-6 z-25 items-stretch w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto p-4 md:p-6 bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl\">\n      \n      {/* 1. onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(Number(e.target.value))}\n              disabled={gameState !== 'starting' || betStatus === 'placed'}\n              className=\"w-full bg-transparent text-white font-bold outline-none\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n          <label htmlFor=\"targetMultiplier\" className=\"text-slate-400 text-sm id=\"targetMultiplier\"\n              type=\"number\" \n              step=\"0.1\"\n              min=\"1.01\"\n              value={targetMultiplier}\n              onChange={(e) => outline-none\"\n            />\n            <span className=\"p-3 text-slate-500 font-bold\">x</span>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"mt-6 flex flex-col items-center           >\n              PLACE BET\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {gameState === 'starting' && betStatus === 'placed' && (\n            <button \n              disabled\n              className=\"w-full py-4 bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/50 font-black text-xl tracking-widest rounded-xl transition-all cursor-not-allowed uppercase\"\n            >\n              BET LOCKED\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {gameState !== 'starting' && betStatus === 'won' && (\n            <button \n              disabled\n       >\n              FLIGHT IN PROGRESS\n            </button>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* 2.
